clickhouse:
WITH
    session_summary AS (SELECT
            events.`$session_id` AS sid,
            min(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_0)s)) AS sess_start,
            countIf(and(equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_1)s), or(like(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_2)s), equals(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_3)s), equals(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_4)s)))) AS blog_pv,
            countIf(and(equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_5)s), ifNull(greaterOrEquals(accurateCastOrNull(accurateCastOrNull(has(events.properties_group_custom, %(hogql_val_6)s) ? events.properties_group_custom[%(hogql_val_6)s] : null, %(hogql_val_7)s), %(hogql_val_8)s), 75), 0), or(like(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_9)s), equals(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_10)s), equals(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_11)s)))) AS deep_scroll,
            countIf(and(equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_12)s), or(equals(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_13)s), like(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_14)s), equals(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_15)s), like(events.`mat_$pathname`, %(hogql_val_16)s)))) AS compare_pv,
            countIf(equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_17)s)) AS aff_clicks,
            any(nullIf(nullIf(events.`mat_$device_type`, ''), 'null')) AS device,
            argMin(nullIf(nullIf(events.`mat_$pathname`, ''), 'null'), toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_18)s)) AS landing_path,
            minIf(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_19)s), equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_20)s)) AS first_aff
        FROM
            events
        WHERE
            and(equals(events.team_id, 275753), greaterOrEquals(events.timestamp, toDateTime64(%(hogql_val_21)s, 6, %(hogql_val_22)s)), less(events.timestamp, toDateTime64(%(hogql_val_23)s, 6, %(hogql_val_24)s)), isNotNull(events.`$session_id`), not(match(coalesce(events.`mat_$raw_user_agent`, replaceRegexpAll(nullIf(nullIf(JSONExtractRaw(events.properties, %(hogql_val_25)s), ''), 'null'), '^"|"$', ''), %(hogql_val_26)s), %(hogql_val_27)s)))
        GROUP BY
            events.`$session_id`)
SELECT
    count() AS step1_sessions,
    countIf(ifNull(greater(session_summary.blog_pv, 0), 0)) AS step2_blog,
    countIf(and(ifNull(greater(session_summary.blog_pv, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.deep_scroll, 0), 0))) AS step3_scroll,
    countIf(and(ifNull(greater(session_summary.blog_pv, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.deep_scroll, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.compare_pv, 0), 0))) AS step4_compare,
    countIf(and(ifNull(greater(session_summary.blog_pv, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.deep_scroll, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.compare_pv, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.aff_clicks, 0), 0))) AS step5_aff,
    countIf(and(ifNull(greater(session_summary.blog_pv, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.compare_pv, 0), 0))) AS alt_step3_compare,
    countIf(and(ifNull(greater(session_summary.blog_pv, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.compare_pv, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.aff_clicks, 0), 0))) AS alt_step4_aff,
    countIf(and(ifNull(greater(session_summary.blog_pv, 0), 0), ifNull(greater(session_summary.aff_clicks, 0), 0))) AS blog_to_aff
FROM
    session_summary
LIMIT 101
OFFSET 0 SETTINGS readonly=2, max_execution_time=10, max_threads=60, allow_experimental_object_type=1, max_ast_elements=4000000, max_expanded_ast_elements=4000000, max_bytes_before_external_group_by=0, enable_analyzer=1, transform_null_in=1, optimize_min_equality_disjunction_chain_length=4294967295, allow_experimental_join_condition=1, use_hive_partitioning=0
hogql:
WITH
    session_summary AS (SELECT
            $session_id AS sid,
            min(timestamp) AS sess_start,
            countIf(and(equals(event, '$pageview'), or(like(properties.$pathname, '/never-hungover/%'), equals(properties.$pathname, '/research'), equals(properties.$pathname, '/guide')))) AS blog_pv,
            countIf(and(equals(event, 'scroll_depth_milestone'), greaterOrEquals(toFloat(properties.depth_percentage), 75), or(like(properties.$pathname, '/never-hungover/%'), equals(properties.$pathname, '/research'), equals(properties.$pathname, '/guide')))) AS deep_scroll,
            countIf(and(equals(event, '$pageview'), or(equals(properties.$pathname, '/compare'), like(properties.$pathname, '/compare%'), equals(properties.$pathname, '/reviews'), like(properties.$pathname, '/reviews%')))) AS compare_pv,
            countIf(equals(event, 'affiliate_link_click')) AS aff_clicks,
            any(properties.$device_type) AS device,
            argMin(properties.$pathname, timestamp) AS landing_path,
            minIf(timestamp, equals(event, 'affiliate_link_click')) AS first_aff
        FROM
            events
        WHERE
            and(greaterOrEquals(timestamp, '2026-04-29'), less(timestamp, '2026-05-13'), notEquals($session_id, NULL), not(match(coalesce(properties.$raw_user_agent, properties.$useragent, ''), '(?i)bot|crawler|spider|googlebot|bingbot|yandexbot|duckduckbot|slurp|baiduspider|prerender|headless|lighthouse')))
        GROUP BY
            $session_id)
SELECT
    count() AS step1_sessions,
    countIf(greater(blog_pv, 0)) AS step2_blog,
    countIf(and(greater(blog_pv, 0), greater(deep_scroll, 0))) AS step3_scroll,
    countIf(and(greater(blog_pv, 0), greater(deep_scroll, 0), greater(compare_pv, 0))) AS step4_compare,
    countIf(and(greater(blog_pv, 0), greater(deep_scroll, 0), greater(compare_pv, 0), greater(aff_clicks, 0))) AS step5_aff,
    countIf(and(greater(blog_pv, 0), greater(compare_pv, 0))) AS alt_step3_compare,
    countIf(and(greater(blog_pv, 0), greater(compare_pv, 0), greater(aff_clicks, 0))) AS alt_step4_aff,
    countIf(and(greater(blog_pv, 0), greater(aff_clicks, 0))) AS blog_to_aff
FROM
    session_summary
LIMIT 101
OFFSET 0
